videos.headline: Tua leaves game after apparent ankle injury
videos.description: Tua Tagovailoa heads to the locker room in the second quarter after a Tennessee defender falls on his right ankle.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tua leaves game after apparent ankle injury) 2019/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama tops Tennessee despite Tua's injury
videos.description: With Tua Tagovailoa exiting the game due to injury, the No. 1 Alabama offense steps up and continues to dominate as the Tide handily beat Tennessee 35-13 at home.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Alabama tops Tennessee despite Tua’s injury) 2019/10/19 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Harris powers in for 1st Bama TD
videos.description: Najee Harris dives in through traffic for the 1-yard Alabama touchdown early in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Harris powers in for 1st Bama TD) 2019/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Maurer's TD evens score with Bama
videos.description: Tennessee QB Brian Maurer dives over his offensive line for the touchdown to even the score with Alabama in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Maurer's TD evens score with Bama) 2019/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Robinson hits pylon with ball for Bama TD
videos.description: Brian Robinson Jr. barely gets the Alabama touchdown by hitting the pylon with the football in his grasp.

videos.headline: Harris walks in for 2nd TD of day
videos.description: Najee Harris walks into the end zone untouched and undetected as the Tide go up by 11 on Tennessee.

videos.headline: Bama runs trick play for wide-open TD
videos.description: Alabama WR Slade Bolden finds Miller Forristall in the back of the end zone and tosses the ball to him on a trick play for the easy touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bama runs trick play for wide-open TD) 2019/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama's Diggs recovers fumble for 100-yard score
videos.description: Alabama's Trevon Diggs picks up Jarrett Guarantano's fumble on the goal line and returns it 100 yards for a scoop-and-score in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: Saban: Tua has high ankle sprain, may miss 1-2 weeks
videos.description: After Alabama's win vs. Tennessee, Nick Saban says Tua Tagovailoa has a high ankle sprain and might miss 1-2 weeks.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Saban: Tua has high ankle sprain, may miss 1-2 weeks) 2019/10/19
